CivicReport.title: CivicReport
CivicReport.description: Represents a local civic issue reported by a resident

id.description: The unique document ID of the incident report

userId.description: The UID of the user who filed the report

userName.description: The display name of the citizen reporter

userEmail.description: The email address of the citizen reporter

photoUrl.description: Base64 representing the incident photo evidence

description.description: A description outlining detail about the civic incident

location.description: Address and coordinate specifics of the logged incident

category.description: The classified zone of the incident

severity.description: Low, Medium, or High urgency prioritization

status.description: reported, in progress, or resolved status

upvotes.description: Total count of critical urgency priority votes

upvotedBy.description: List of user UIDs who upvoted this incident

aiSummary.description: AI verified extraction tip analyzing incident details

aiDebugError.description: Detailed error context for debugging analyzer calls

debugError.description: Full raw Gemini error message and stack trace text

Verification.title: Verification
Verification.description: Represents a user verification vote indicating whether a reported incident is still active or resolved

issueId.description: The document snapshot ID of the referenced report document

userId.description: The UID of the user casting the verification vote

vote.description: The status vote for the incident

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the verification vote was logged

CivicUser.title: CivicUser
CivicUser.description: Represents a citizen's profile and accumulated civic points

userName.description: The display name of the citizen user

reports/{reportId}.description: Incident reports collection tracking active civic matters

verifications/{verificationId}.description: User feedback checking if reported incidents are still active or resolved
